# terrible_community_general_scaleway_container_namespace (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `name` (String) Name of the container namespace.
- `project_id` (String) Project identifier.
- `region` (String) Scaleway region to use (for example `fr-par`).

### Optional

- `description` (String) Description of the container namespace.
- `environment_variables` (String) Environment variables of the container namespace. Injected in containers at runtime.
- `secret_environment_variables` (String) Secret environment variables of the container namespace. Updating those values does not output a R`ignore:changed` state in Ansible. Injected in containers at runtime.
- `state` (String) Indicate desired state of the container namespace.

### Read-Only

- `container_namespace` (String) The container namespace information.
